description_long: This is a large, cylindrical woven basket with a tightly fitting lid and two prominent side handles. The basket features a striking pattern of interwoven fibers in shades of white, brown, and green, creating a zigzag and banded motif around its body. The lid is circular, matching the basket's diameter, and has a central handle for easy removal. The handles are thick, looped, and appear to be made from the same woven material as the rest of the basket. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight yet sturdy, suitable for carrying or storing items. The surface texture is visually rough, indicative of natural or synthetic wickerwork.
description: A large, cylindrical woven basket with a patterned lid and two looped side handles, featuring white, brown, and green zigzag designs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basket's lid with a central handle and the full pattern on the body.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting one of the thick, looped side handles and the basket's woven texture.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid's handle visible and the opposite side handle partially seen.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the other side handle and the intricate woven pattern.
